body.title: DickSimnel: add DickSimnelWorkerListener mirroring CCWorkerListener
body.result: DickSimnelWorkerListener added: passive bus dispatch, ackâ†’OR checkâ†’inertia gateâ†’startedâ†’ToolLoop. 38 new tests, 957 total pass.
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel receives work exclusively via Granny dispatch envelopes on mailbox dicksimnel.0, never by polling cc_queue for work.
body.description:
DickSimnel currently polls cc_queue every 30s to discover work. The correct pattern (same as CC) is a pushed-dispatch listener: Granny sends {kind:dispatch, ticket_id} to dicksimnel.0; DickSimnel's listener polls that mailbox, receives the envelope, and runs inference.

Create devices/dicksimnel/worker_listener.py containing DickSimnelWorkerListener â€” a class that mirrors CCWorkerListener's structure (devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py is the canonical reference):
- Polls dicksimnel.0 mailbox via fetch_unseen every DICKSIMNEL_LISTENER_POLL_INTERVAL seconds (default 5)
- On dispatch envelope: calls receive_dispatch(env, send_fn, deliver_fn) for ack+started protocol
- deliver_fn: checks OR balance floor (fail-open), fetches full ticket via cc_queue show, checks HIGH-inertia tags, runs ToolLoop, calls _post_result
- On halt/priority envelope: sets stop event (no tmux inject â€” DickSimnel is a process)
- IMAP connection created at start(), closed at stop()

Update devices/dicksimnel/shim.py: replace _poll_loop() + stop.wait(30s) with DickSimnelWorkerListener.start() / .stop(). Shim.start() instantiates the listener with imap=make_bus_connection().

Update devices/dicksimnel/device.py: _poll_and_work() â†’ _handle_dispatch(ticket_id) called from deliver_fn. Remove _claim_next_ticket() â€” ticket_id comes from the envelope, not queue.next. Move OR balance check and HIGH-inertia check into _handle_dispatch.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/worker_listener.py (NEW), devices/dicksimnel/shim.py, devices/dicksimnel/device.py
**Design rules:** bus/ owns comms routing (satisfied â€” listener subscribes to bus mailbox); external state principle (shim holds no in-flight ticket state between calls)
**Scope boundary:** IN: listener class, shim wiring, device dispatch handler, ack/started reply protocol. OUT: Granny config change (T-dicksimnel-granny-dispatch-wire), double-close fix (T-dicksimnel-double-close), max-turns reason fix (T-dicksimnel-max-turns-reason)
**Completion criteria:** tests/inference/test_dicksimnel.py covers: (1) dispatch envelope in dicksimnel.0 â†’ ToolLoop called + dispatch_ack sent to granny.0; (2) halt envelope â†’ listener stop event set; (3) IMAP fetch_unseen raises â†’ _poll_once returns silently (no crash); (4) OR balance at floor â†’ dispatch declined via channel event, NOT unhandled exception. Completion condition: no calls to cc_queue.py next --worker dicksimnel anywhere in the listener/shim/device; all 103 existing tests still pass.
